title: Missing Content-Security-Policy (CSP)
description: The response is missing a CSP header, leaving the site vulnerable to XSS.

title: Missing HTTP Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS)
description: The site does not enforce HTTPS via HSTS header.

title: Missing X-Frame-Options Header
description: The site can be framed by other domains, enabling clickjacking.

title: Missing X-Content-Type-Options Header
description: The response allows content sniffing without X-Content-Type-Options.

title: X-Powered-By Header Exposure
description: The server reveals framework information via the X-Powered-By header.

title: Legacy TLS Protocols Enabled
description: The server still accepts TLSv1.0 and TLSv1.1 connections.

title: Nginx server_tokens Enabled
description: The server discloses its version via server_tokens config.
